subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh in the Most Great Prison is verily the Source of affliction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق فی السجن الاعظم انه لمرجع الباساء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
